name: Alling Golf Club
about: Alling Golf Club is a golf facility that operates as a country club with an attached simulator bay. The venue caters to both on-course golfers and simulator users, offering memberships and public access. It features a bar and grill for dining and social purposes. The technology offering includes a Trackman simulator bay, which provides an indoor golf experience. The club offers various rates including twilight, resident, non-resident, and season pass options, with a focus on accessibility for different player types and family units.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman simulator technology for realistic practice and play
Dedicated booking system for convenient tee time and simulator bay reservations
Family-friendly environment with special rates for juniors and family memberships
Comprehensive golf offerings including on-course play and indoor simulation

food_and_drink.notes: On-site restaurant 'The Cove Bar & Grill' available
Bar service available at The Cove Bar & Grill

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The provided content does not specify whether clubs are provided for the simulator bay. It is recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has an on-site bar and grill called 'The Cove Bar & Grill', but it does not specify if outside food and drinks are permitted. BYOB policy is not mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The content does not specify the duration for playing 18 holes on the simulator bay. Typically, simulator play can vary based on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Alling Golf Club is kid-friendly, offering free entry for juniors age 12 and under, discounted rates for ages 13-17, and a family membership option.
